description: Style NoteCreated for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche.Product DetailsHeavily embellished bronze thong style straps and a toe separatorSmooth footbed with branding embossedTPU outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareWipe with damp cloth to remove dust
